stemHtml: An airway in mountainous terrain is designed so that the lowest level is above the Minimum Obstacle Clearance Altitude (MOCA). What is the approximate minimum clearance used in calculating the MOCA?

options.b: 1500 ft for terrain elevations less than 5000 ft; 2000 ft for terrain elevations greater than 5000 ft.
options.d: 1500 ft clearance over obstacles up to and including 5000 ft; and 2000 ft clearance for obstacles over 5000 ft in elevation.
